# toktap

> Transparent LLM API proxy that extracts token usage from SSE streams and writes metrics to InfluxDB. ~0.1ms overhead. Supports Anthropic, OpenAI, OpenRouter, xAI.

## Docs

- [README](https://github.com/voska/toktap/blob/master/README.md): Project overview, quick start, configuration, benchmarks
- [CLAUDE.md](https://github.com/voska/toktap/blob/master/CLAUDE.md): Architecture, code layout, route config, technical details
- [CHANGELOG](https://github.com/voska/toktap/blob/master/CHANGELOG.md): Release history

## Links

- Website: https://toktap.co
- GitHub: https://github.com/voska/toktap
- Releases: https://github.com/voska/toktap/releases
